title: Kaleidoscope Engine
description: Paint in N-fold rotational symmetry — glow, spray, line, and dot brushes with mirror mode, auto-spin, and PNG export.
concept: A real-time kaleidoscope painter where every stroke is instantly reflected across 2–16 configurable folds with optional bilateral mirror symmetry. Five brush types from neon glow to spray-paint, a rainbow auto-color mode, and an autonomous spin mode that generates mesmerizing patterns without user input. Every canvas is saved to localStorage and can be exported as a hi-res PNG.
features: 2–16 fold rotational symmetry with live fold control
Mirror toggle doubles each fold into bilateral symmetry
Five brush types: Glow, Soft, Spray, Dots, Line
Rainbow auto-hue mode + hue bar + 8 swatch palette

interaction.mouse: Draw anywhere to paint with kaleidoscope symmetry
interaction.click: Buttons: fold +/−, mirror, brush type, spin, undo, clear, export
